subject: The Automation Revolution: Why Manual Lead Work Is Dead
previewText: Compliance automation isn't optional anymore—it's survival

featuredArticle.title: Compliance Automation Workflows: Bulletproof Your Lead Operation in 2026
featuredArticle.spotlight: This isn't about convenience—it's about survival. Manual DNC scrubbing and consent tracking will cost you thousands in violations this year. Here's the automation framework that bulletproofs your operation.
